summary: Tested NCAA Key Dates widget on player dashboard. All 12 backend tests pass. UI fully functional — widget renders with Transfer Portal Spring Window as active event (ACTIVE NOW, 8 days remaining), 5 upcoming event cards with correct categories and colors.

features_verified.ncaa_calendar_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/dashboard/ncaa-calendar returns 200 with current_event and upcoming
features_verified.active_event: PASS - Transfer Portal Spring Window (May 1-15) is active_event with is_current=true, days_remaining=8
features_verified.upcoming_events: PASS - Dead Period (15d), Eligibility (39d), Contact Period (86d), Application (178d), Early Signing (188d) all present
features_verified.current_event_banner: PASS - data-testid=ncaa-current-event with 'ACTIVE NOW' badge, event title, days remaining
features_verified.category_colors: PASS - Period=blue, Eligibility=green, Application=rose, Signing=purple, Portal=amber all visually correct
features_verified.dashboard_layout: PASS - Trial Banner, Stats Grid, Weekly Goals, Weekly Digest, no-alerts-banner, NCAA Key Dates, My Colleges+Recent Emails all present

critical_code_review_comments: The Regular Signing Period (Apr 16 – May 21) overlaps with Transfer Portal Spring Window (May 1 – May 15). On May 7 the code finds Transfer Portal first (later in the list) as current_event and ignores Regular Signing Period which is also active. This is minor since both are correct for the testing date and only one current_event is returned — but worth noting for accuracy.
The backend uses datetime.now(timezone.utc) for today's date but the NCAA_PLAYER_CALENDAR list is hardcoded. This is intentional for this feature but will need updating each season.
updated_files: /app/memory/test_credentials.md (indirectly — set full_name='Test Player' via PUT /api/profile for player@test.com to bypass onboarding redirect)
seed_data_creation: Set full_name='Test Player' for player@test.com profile via PUT /api/profile to allow dashboard access
context_for_next_testing_agent: NCAA Key Dates feature fully tested and working. Player account player@test.com now has full_name='Test Player' set so onboarding redirect no longer blocks dashboard access. Test player has no tracked colleges or emails so some widgets show empty states.
